sourceMetadata.sourceName: UT Austin Admissions + Hook normalized degree plans
notes: This file preserves a normalized undergrad-only degree-plan format for Hook.
Current plans cover Hook-supported demo majors and stay consumable by the existing academic analysis engine through an adapter.

sourceMetadata.sourceName: UT Austin Admissions + Hook normalized degree plans
notes: UT admissions confirms Computer Science as an undergraduate major in the College of Natural Sciences.
Requirement buckets are normalized from Hook's current curated CS degree data.

requirementBuckets.title: Writing & Humanities Core
requirementBuckets.notes: Choose approved sections that meet university core outcomes.

requirementBuckets.title: Math & Science Core
requirementBuckets.notes: Physics sequence must include labs.

requirementBuckets.title: Social Science & Ethics
requirementBuckets.notes: At least one course must be designated writing intensive.

requirementBuckets.title: CS Foundations
requirementBuckets.notes: Programming sequence builds toward systems and algorithms.

requirementBuckets.title: CS Advanced Core
requirementBuckets.notes: CS 450 is the capstone and must be taken after CS 410.

requirementBuckets.title: CS Major Electives
requirementBuckets.notes: Select at least two courses at the 300-level or above.

plans.degreeName: B.S. in Electrical and Computer Engineering

sourceMetadata.sourceName: UT Austin Admissions + Hook normalized degree plans
notes: UT admissions confirms Electrical and Computer Engineering as an undergraduate Cockrell major.
Requirement buckets are normalized from Hook's current curated ECE degree data.

requirementBuckets.title: Writing & Humanities Core
requirementBuckets.notes: Select humanities courses that satisfy university core outcomes.

requirementBuckets.title: Math & Science Core
requirementBuckets.notes: Calculus sequence must be completed before upper-division ECE labs.

requirementBuckets.title: Social Science & Ethics
requirementBuckets.notes: At least one course must be designated writing intensive.

requirementBuckets.title: ECE Foundations
requirementBuckets.notes: Core circuit and programming sequence prepares students for systems labs.

requirementBuckets.title: ECE Systems Core
requirementBuckets.notes: ECE 450 capstone requires completion of ECE 410.

requirementBuckets.title: ECE Major Electives
requirementBuckets.notes: Choose advanced electives aligned to power, embedded, or communications tracks.

sourceMetadata.sourceName: UT Austin Admissions + Hook normalized degree plans
notes: UT admissions confirms Biology as an undergraduate major in the College of Natural Sciences.
Requirement buckets are normalized from Hook's current curated Biology degree data.

requirementBuckets.title: Writing & Humanities Core
requirementBuckets.notes: Complete the writing sequence before upper-division lab courses.

requirementBuckets.title: Math & Chemistry Core
requirementBuckets.notes: Organic chemistry must be completed before molecular biology.

requirementBuckets.title: Social Science & Ethics
requirementBuckets.notes: Select one course that fulfills the civic engagement requirement.

requirementBuckets.title: Biology Foundations
requirementBuckets.notes: Intro sequence includes lectures and core lab skills.

requirementBuckets.title: Advanced Biology Core
requirementBuckets.notes: BIOL 410 capstone requires completion of genetics and cell biology.

requirementBuckets.title: Biology Electives
requirementBuckets.notes: Choose electives from ecology, microbiology, or neuroscience tracks.

sourceMetadata.sourceName: UT Austin Admissions + Hook normalized degree plans
notes: UT admissions lists McCombs majors individually; Hook currently maps them to one generalized undergraduate business plan for MVP analysis.
Requirement buckets are normalized from Hook's current curated business degree data.

requirementBuckets.title: Writing & Humanities Core
requirementBuckets.notes: Writing sequence must be completed by the end of sophomore year.

requirementBuckets.title: Quantitative & Analytics Core
requirementBuckets.notes: Statistics and economics must be completed before upper-division finance.

requirementBuckets.title: Social Science & Ethics
requirementBuckets.notes: COMM 205 satisfies the oral communication requirement.

requirementBuckets.title: Business Core
requirementBuckets.notes: Accounting sequence must be completed prior to finance and strategy.

requirementBuckets.title: Strategy & Analytics
requirementBuckets.notes: STRAT 450 is the capstone and should be taken in the final year.

requirementBuckets.title: Business Electives
requirementBuckets.notes: Select electives that align to finance, marketing, or operations pathways.
